title: taraxacum cordilleranum
intro: Taraxacum cordilleranum, also known as the Andean dandelion, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family, Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum cordilleranum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting liver function, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. The herbal preparations of Taraxacum cordilleranum typically involve infusions, decoctions, or teas made from the leaves and roots of the plant, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
